header: On by default. Off your to-do list.
subheadline: Dark mode, icons, modern CSS, and accessibility foundations arrive with the system; project-level content and testing remain part of launch.

items.title: Dark mode built in
items.description_text: Light, dark, and auto from one token set — no second stylesheet, ever.

items.title: 5 icon libraries
items.description_text: Lucide, Tabler, HugeIcons, Phosphor, or Remix Icon — swap with one setting.

items.title: Tailwind v4 + OKLCH
items.description_text: Modern color tokens and container queries, prewired and production-ready.

items.title: WCAG 2.2 contrast checks
items.description_text: Theme-token contrast is tested across every preset; final page conformance still depends on content and integrations.
